title: GET /api/day-status/:topicSlug/:dateKey Response
description: Response shape returned by the /api/day-status/:topicSlug/:dateKey Pages Function. Returns publish state, readiness flags, and navigation keys for a topic/day page. Returns 404 when the topic_slug is not found in the topics table.

date_key.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format that this status row covers.

page_state.description: Current publish state of the topic/day page. Defaults to 'pending' when no daily_status row exists.

display_name.description: Human-readable topic name for display in the UI.

alert_count.description: Number of alerts collected for this topic/day.

cluster_count.description: Number of event clusters formed for this topic/day.

summary_available.description: 1 when the AI-generated daily summary is ready.

video_available.description: 1 when the daily video has been published to YouTube.

article_available.description: 1 when the editorial article has been published to GitHub.

prev_date_key.description: YYYY-MM-DD date of the previous day that has content for this topic. Null when there is no earlier day.

next_date_key.description: YYYY-MM-DD date of the next day that has content for this topic. Null when there is no later day.

published_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the page was published. Null when not yet published.
